Honestly, is it really your fault for thinking you're not in a serious relationship with Aleksandr? He flies around Europe and ask you to meet him when he's available, pays for your trips, is ambiguous about his job and gives you expensive gifts and straight cash.

Well, seems like he's aware of the issue, which is why he decided to invite you to stay in his mansion in Moscow for the entire winter, so you have some actual quality time together!

Just don't dig around too much, otherwise he'll have to explain why there are guns hidden in the house...or what exactly does that tattoo on his arm mean.
